scenes.description: 第1个场景，对应第1个切片

video_prompt.video_prompt: Animated children's storybook style, vibrant pastel color palette with soft shadows and gentle rim lighting. Scene opens on a cheerful anthropomorphic white rabbit with pink inner ears, wearing a tiny blue overalls and wide-eyed fearful expression, recoiling backward as a giant green pea vine rapidly grows upward from garden soil—twisting, coiling, and stretching toward the sky like animated spaghetti. In the background: sun-dappled cottage garden with wooden fence, flower pots, and distant roofline; vine already wraps around a lamppost and climbs halfway up the house wall. A small gray kitten dangles precariously from the vine’s tip, paws gripping a leaf. Camera starts wide (establishing shot), then smoothly dollies forward while tilting up to follow vine growth, ending in a medium-high angle showing scale and urgency. Smooth motion blur on fast-growing vines. Rendered in 4K resolution with crisp anti-aliased outlines, soft painterly textures, and consistent cartoon shading. Clear, centered, bold sans-serif Chinese subtitles rendered in real-time with high contrast (white text + black stroke), synced precisely to audio: '小兔子豌豆藤蔓不知为什么变大了,太可怕了。我的天哪,越来越大越来越高了。我觉得太有趣了,为了安全,必须扳倒慢腾。小兔子不要。'

style_elements.characters: White rabbit: fluffy fur, expressive large eyes, blue overalls, trembling limbs, mouth open mid-exclamation; kitten: gray, wide-eyed, clinging to vine tip with paws, tail curled nervously.
style_elements.environment: Sunny suburban garden with cobblestone path, potted marigolds, picket fence, and cozy cottage with red roof; pea vine dominates frame—lush, glossy green, thickening dynamically as it grows.
style_elements.visual_style: 2D hand-drawn animation style with soft gradients, warm daylight illumination (golden hour tone), gentle bokeh background, rich saturation without harsh edges.
style_elements.camera_movement: Opening wide shot → slow forward dolly + upward tilt tracking vine growth; ends at medium-high angle emphasizing height and peril; subtle parallax layering on background elements.

scenes.description: 第2个场景，对应第2个切片

video_prompt.video_prompt: Animated scene: A fluffy white cartoon rabbit with oversized ears, wearing a tiny red bandana and wide-eyed fearful expression, frantically tugging at an enormous, rapidly growing green pea vine that coils like animated spaghetti around a wooden cottage. A small gray kitten dangles precariously from the vine’s tip near the rooftop; a gentle brown bear in a blue overalls stands below, gesturing reassuringly with outstretched paws. Background: sunlit pastoral countryside with soft-focus wildflowers, wooden fence, and a thatched-roof cottage overtaken by lush, glossy pea vines glowing with subtle bioluminescent highlights. Warm golden-hour lighting, pastel color palette with vibrant emerald greens and creamy whites. Smooth tracking shot starts mid-shot of rabbit’s struggle, then dollies upward following vine growth toward roof, ending in a low-angle wide shot revealing full scale of vine chaos. Cinematic 2D animation style with hand-drawn textures, gentle motion blur on fast vine movement, and soft shadows. High-resolution 16:9 frame at 24fps. Clear, bold, centered Chinese subtitles with rounded sans-serif font (Noto Sans SC), white text with black stroke, synced precisely to audio: '小兔子豌豆藤蔓不知为什么变大了,太可怕了。我的天哪,越来越大越来越高了。我觉得太有趣了,为了安全,必须扳倒慢腾。小兔子不要。'

style_elements.characters: Fluffy white cartoon rabbit with expressive large eyes, red bandana, panicked gestures; gray kitten dangling from vine tip with paws clutching; brown bear in blue overalls offering calm, supportive posture.
style_elements.environment: Sun-drenched rural cottage garden with wooden fence, wildflower borders, and hyper-expressive, oversized pea vines coiling dynamically up walls and toward roof — glossy, semi-translucent leaves with dewdrop highlights.
style_elements.visual_style: 2D hand-drawn animation aesthetic, soft pastel palette dominated by mint green, buttery yellow, and sky blue; warm directional lighting with gentle rim light on characters; subtle bloom effect on vine glow.
style_elements.camera_movement: Smooth upward dolly shot beginning at medium close-up on rabbit’s face and hands, tracking vertically along vine to reveal escalating scale and rooftop peril; ends in dynamic low-angle wide shot.

scenes.description: 第3个场景，对应第3个切片

video_prompt.video_prompt: Animated scene in cheerful, vibrant 2D cartoon style: A giant, anthropomorphic pea vine coils dynamically upward, engulfing a cozy wooden cottage roof; its green tendrils pulse with gentle bioluminescence. Small animals—white fluffy rabbit (blue overalls, wide-eyed panic), brown bear (red bandana, determined expression), and gray kitten (perched precariously on vine tip, paws gripping)—are caught mid-action. Rabbit gestures frantically downward; bear braces against the vine with outstretched arms; kitten dangles playfully. Background features sun-dappled suburban garden, flowerbeds, distant park silhouette, soft bokeh sky. Warm golden-hour lighting with high-contrast rim light on characters. Smooth tracking shot starts low-angle (emphasizing vine scale), arcs upward in a slow crane movement to reveal rooftop vantage, then pushes in to medium close-up of trio’s expressive faces. Cinematic depth-of-field, crisp line art, soft watercolor textures. Generate clear, centered, bold sans-serif Chinese subtitles synced precisely to audio: '天哪,它就像面条一样全出脚了,这可怎么办啊？这样下去越来越大,蔓头上面的小猫会很危险的。小熊,你别担心,所有问题都有解决方案的。我们三个人一起努力,能把他们带下来的！'

style_elements.characters: White rabbit with pink ears, blue overalls, exaggerated fearful expression and flailing arms; brown bear with red bandana, sturdy posture and reassuring gaze; gray kitten with oversized paws, perched atop vine tip, tail curled nervously. All characters have smooth cel-shaded animation, expressive eyebrows and blinking eyes.
style_elements.environment: Sunlit suburban cottage roof overtaken by colossal, springy pea vine; terracotta tiles, scattered leaves, distant park trees and playground swing set visible. Garden below includes blooming marigolds, a tiny wheelbarrow, and a 'PEA POWER' sign half-covered by vines.
style_elements.visual_style: Bright, saturated palette dominated by emerald greens, sky blues, and warm yellows; soft ambient occlusion, gentle subsurface scattering on fur/leaves; hand-painted texture overlay with subtle grain for storybook charm.
style_elements.camera_movement: Low-angle start (ground level), smoothly craning up along vine spiral, then transitioning to dynamic arc-left dolly-in to medium close-up on animal trio's faces at rooftop apex — steady motion with slight parallax layering.

scenes.description: 第4个场景，对应第4个切片

video_prompt.video_prompt: Animated children's storybook style scene: A panicked white rabbit with floppy ears, blue overalls, and wide-eyed expression scrambles backward on a wooden floor as an enormous, rapidly growing green pea vine coils upward like animated spaghetti—stretching toward the ceiling, its tendrils wrapping around rafters. A tiny orange kitten dangles precariously from the vine’s tip, paws clutching a leaf; a small brown bear watches anxiously near a ladder, holding a pair of gardening shears. Background: cozy cottage interior with warm yellow walls, sunlit windows, hanging kitchen pots, and scattered pea pods. Soft diffused lighting, vibrant saturated colors (emerald vines, sky-blue accents), hand-drawn texture with subtle watercolor bleed. Medium tracking shot starts low-angle to emphasize vine’s height, then dollies forward smoothly as rabbit trips, pans up to reveal vine reaching roof beams. High-resolution 24fps animation, crisp anti-aliased edges, gentle motion blur on fast vine growth. Generate clear, centered, bold sans-serif Chinese subtitles synced precisely to audio: '天哪,它就像面条一样全出脚了,这可怎么办啊？这样下去越来越大,蔓头上面的小猫会很 dangerous 的。'

style_elements.characters: White rabbit with expressive eyes and blue overalls, panicking and stumbling; orange kitten clinging to vine tip, fearful but cute; brown bear in red scarf, tense and supportive.
style_elements.environment: Sunlit rustic cottage interior with wooden floor, exposed beams, potted herbs, and visible pea pod decorations; vine aggressively climbing walls and ceiling.
style_elements.visual_style: Bright, cheerful children’s book animation with watercolor textures, high saturation, soft shadows, and gentle outlines.
style_elements.camera_movement: Low-angle medium tracking shot starting at rabbit’s feet, smoothly dollying forward and tilting up to follow vine’s ascent toward ceiling.

scenes.description: 第5个场景，对应第5个切片

video_prompt.video_prompt: Animated 2D children's storybook style scene: Three anthropomorphic animals — a fluffy white rabbit in a blue overalls, wide-eyed with urgent concern; a small brown bear in red scarf, trembling slightly but determined; and a curious gray kitten clinging to the top of an impossibly tall, spiraling pea vine that has grown uncontrollably into the sky, wrapping around a cozy wooden cottage roof. The vine pulses with soft green bioluminescence, dotted with blooming purple flowers and plump peas. Background shows sun-dappled countryside with pastel clouds, warm golden-hour lighting casting long gentle shadows. Camera starts with medium tracking shot following the vine upward, then tilts up dynamically to reveal the trio on the rooftop, ending in a stable wide shot showing all three characters reaching toward the vine while the kitten dangles playfully. High-resolution 2D animation, smooth motion, soft outlines, vibrant saturated colors, gentle bokeh background blur. Include clear, centered, aesthetically styled Chinese subtitles synced precisely to audio: '天哪,它就像面条一样全出脚了,这可怎么办啊？这样下去越来越大,蔓头上面的小猫会很 dangerous 的。小熊,你别担心,所有问题都有解决方案的。我们三个人一起努力,能把他们带下来的！'

style_elements.characters: Fluffy white rabbit (blue overalls, expressive eyes, gesturing urgently); small brown bear (red scarf, anxious yet resolute posture); gray kitten (playful, clinging to vine tip, tail curled); all with smooth cartoon proportions and subtle squash-and-stretch animation.
style_elements.environment: Sunlit rural cottage roof overrun by glowing green pea vine; wooden shingles, potted herbs, distant meadow and soft-focus hills; warm ambient light with lens flare accents.
style_elements.visual_style: 2D storybook animation, rich saturation, hand-painted texture overlay, soft diffusion glow on vine, consistent line weight, cheerful yet urgent mood.
style_elements.camera_movement: Dynamic upward tilt from mid-height vine base to rooftop wide shot; smooth parallax scrolling background; final frame holds steady for subtitle legibility.
